== Notes for [[Item:Q101350|Q101350]] ==

https://www.genealogieonline.nl/en/stamboom-haverbus/I53745584.php

----

https://www.genealogieonline.nl/en/stamboom-haverbus/kwartierstaat.php?id=I15824668

https://www.genealogieonline.nl/balogh-family-tree/I20285.php


https://www.heilesen.dk/gen/familychart.php?familyID=F639&tree=tree1

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9DFE3E1EFBBFA9822EF79916CC52F
geni:6000000000348876605

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
